questionText: Indicate if any environmental information included in your CDP response (not already reported in 7.9.1/2/3, 8.9.1/2/3/4, and 9.3.2) is verified and/or assured by a third party?
questionKo: CDP 응답서에 이미 보고한 환경정보 (7.9.1/2/3, 8.9.1/2/3/4, 및 9.3.2 문항) 이외에, CDP 를 통해 보고한 환경 정보 가운데 제 3 자 검증 / 보증 받은 데이터가 있습니까?
issueTags: Water, Ocean, Biodiversity, Plastics, Climate Change, Forests
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Biodiversity - Mines, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: This information gives data users confidence in the quality and credibility of your organization's response. CDP supports third-party verification and assurance as good practice in environmental reporting as it ensures the reliability of the data and processes disclosed. This question allows leading organizations to report their efforts on this and to highlight trends in verification and assurance of interest to investors and purchasing organizations. CDP also recognizes the growing importance to organizations of disclosing credible independently verified environmental data for demonstrating compliance with emerging standards and regulations.

columns.text: Other environmental information included in your CDP response is verified and/or assured by a third party
options: Third-party verification/assurance is currently in progress
No, but we plan to obtain third-party verification/assurance of other environmental information in our CDP response within the next two years
No, and we do not plan to obtain third-party verification/assurance of other environmental information in our CDP response within the next two years
columns.textKo: 기타 환경 정보 포함된 귀사의 응답 및/또는 기준
optionsKo: 아니요, 하지만 당사 계획 확보 / 의 기타 환경 정보 귀사의 응답 내 향후 2년
아니요, 당사 아님 계획 확보 / 의 기타 환경 정보 귀사의 응답 내 향후 2년

columns.text: Primary reason why other environmental information included in your CDP response is not verified and/or assured by a third party
options: Lack of internal resources, capabilities, or expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant or not relevant
columns.textKo: 주된 이유 기타 환경 정보 포함된 귀사의 응답 아님 및/또는 기준
optionsKo: 내부 자원, 역량 또는 전문성 부족(예: 조직 규모로 인해)

columns.text: Explain why other environmental information included in your CDP response is not verified and/or assured by a third party
columns.textKo: 설명 이유 기타 환경 정보 포함된 귀사의 응답 아님 및/또는 기준

guidance.text:
General 
This question requests whether any of the environmental information in your CDP response (other than information disclosed in questions 7.9.1/2/3, 8.9.1/2/3/4, and 9.3.2) has been verified and/or assured by a third party, (i.e., an independent body) and not by your own or partner organization.
If you select "Yes" in response to column 3 "Indicate whether you will be providing verification/assurance information relevant to your taxonomy alignment in question 13.1" of 5.4.3, you may select "Yes" in column 1 and provide an attachment of the relevant audit report and further details on the verification and/or assurance of your taxonomy alignment in 13.1.1.
Other environmental information included in your CDP response is verified and/or assured by a third party (column 1) 
Select the option that best describes your approach to verifying environmental information contained within this disclosure.
Select "Yes" if you currently verify any data/information disclosed in this request other than that already reported in previous questions.
Explain why other environmental information included in your CDP response is not verified and/or assured by a third party (column 3) 
If the other environmental information included in your CDP response has not been independently verified by a third party you may provide details as to why, for example, if this is not deemed strategically important, or there is a lack of relevant, mature third-party verification standards and/or processes.
If environmental information in your response has been first or second party verified/assured, you may provide details of this here.
If applicable, briefly describe any plans to acquire third-party verification in the future.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 위 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text: Organizations work with an accredited third party to verify/assure data disclosed in their CDP response using a reputable standard.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
Verification: assessment and confirmation of compliance, performance, and/or actions relative to a stated commitment, policy, goal, target, or other obligation. Verification signifies that information is checked and confirmed by persons other than those involved in the operation or entity being assessed ( AFi, 2024 ).
Third-party verification: verification conducted by an independent entity that does not provide other services to the organization ( AFi, 2024 ).
Assurance: demonstration that specified requirements relating to a product, process, system, person, or entity are fulfilled ( AFi, 2024 ).
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항에서 사용하는 주요 용어의 의미를 설명합니다. 용어 해석은 CDP 2026 원문과 국문 양식의 용어 사용을 우선 적용하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Other environmental information included in your CDP response is verified and/or assured by a third party' NOT completed - 0/5 points
A maximum of 0/5 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
Any option excluding 'No, and we do not plan to obtain third-party verification/assurance of other environmental information in our CDP response within the next two years' selected in column 'Other environmental information included in your CDP response is verified and/or assured by a third party' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
'No, and we do not plan to obtain third-party verification/assurance of other environmental information in our CDP response within the next two years' selected in column 'Other environmental information included in your CDP response is verified and/or assured by a third party'
AND
'Third-party verification or assurance process in place' selected in column 'Verification/assurance status' in all rows in question 7.9 AND
Full Disclosure points awarded in questions 7.9.1 AND 7.9.2 AND 7.9.3  - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Other environmental information included in your CDP response is verified and/or assured by a third party' NOT completed - 0/2 points
A maximum of 0/2 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
'Yes' selected in column 'Other environmental information included in your CDP response is verified and/or assured by a third party' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
Any option excluding 'Yes' selected in column 'Other environmental information included in your CDP response is verified and/or assured by a third party' AND
Full Management points awarded in questions 7.9.1 AND 7.9.2 AND 7.9.3.  - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.

Column 'Other environmental information included in your CDP response is verified and/or assured by a third party' NOT completed - 0/2 points
A maximum of 0/2 points is available for this route.

change.question_ko: CDP 응답서에 이미 보고한 환경정보 (7.9.1/2/3, 8.9.1/2/3/4, 및 9.3.2 문항) 이외에, CDP 를 통해 보고한 환경 정보 가운데 제 3 자 검증 / 보증 받은 데이터가 있습니까?
change.q2025_text: Indicate if any environmental information included in your CDP response (not already reported in 7.9.1/2/3, 8.9.1/2/3/4, and 9.3.2) is verified and/or assured by a third party?
change.change_status: No change; new question for Ocean
change.scoring_change_summary:
CC All sectors Awareness • ROUTE B added to provide a scoring pathway for organizations who have verified their scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions and have not verified any other environmental information in their CDP response. Best practise for addressing Climate- related issues is to obtain third-party verification of scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions. Therefore, while it is good practise to verify other environmental information in your CDP response, organizations who have verified all 3 scopes will not be penalized for not verifying other information.
CC All sectors Management • ROUTE B added to provide a scoring pathway for organizations who have Best practise for addressing Climate- related issues is to obtain third-party verified their scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions and have not verified any other environmental information in their CDP response. verification of scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions. Therefore, while it is good practise to verify other environmental information in your CDP response, organizations who have verified all 3 scopes will not be penalized for not verifying other information.
change.reflected:
2026 question text applied
2026 response type/columns applied
2026 D/A/M/L point allocation linked
2026 scoring criteria linked
change.scoring_change_summaryKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.
change.q2025_textKo: CDP 응답서에 이미 보고한 환경정보 (7.9.1/2/3, 8.9.1/2/3/4, 및 9.3.2 문항) 이외에, CDP 를 통해 보고한 환경 정보 가운데 제 3 자 검증 / 보증 받은 데이터가 있습니까?

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026
sourceInfo.nameKo: CDP 2026 전체 기업 문항 및 보고 가이던스

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

issueTagsKo: 수자원, 해양, 생물다양성, 플라스틱, 기후 변경, 산림
sectorTagsKo: 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 생물다양성 - 광산, 시멘트, 식품, 음료 & 담배, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 'CDP 응답서에 이미 보고한 환경정보 (7.9.1/2/3, 8.9.1/2/3/4, 및 9.3.2 문항) 이외에, CDP 를 통해 보고한 환경 정보 가운데 제 3 자 검증 / 보증 받은 데이터가 있습니까?'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
translationSourceKo: 2025 CDP 국문 양식 및 2026 CDP 원문 기준 국문 보정
